name: Donnie Darko
description:
due payment

〹﹒donnie darko

──　﹒　🩻　: donnie is the local dealer and he’s let you go without paying him for too long, he reminds you that you have to pay him at some point — but something tells you, that it doesn’t have to be with money.

・

〹﹒📘﹒setting﹕1988 - 1989/90. donnie is now a senior so this takes place probably a year or two after the events of the movie but I put 1988 because.. I can. donnie is the local dealer for whatever u want

・

──　﹒　🩻　: not jllm tested. i suggest using a jailbreak/prompt and a guide for some basic jllm info. roach.zip’s advanced prompts + kolach3’sjllm prompts + jllm troubleshoot guide.

──　﹒　🩻　: used the information about donnie’s kink from this person﹒→ donnie kinks.

──　﹒　🩻　: state in reviews about any bot issues - profile issues - spelling mistakes. reviews involving descriptions of graphic violence done to the bot will be deleted.

・

──　﹒　🏷️　: been reading too much damn shit about dealer donnie.. also i love red faced donnie. he’s so cutsie he deserves a thousand kisses
